title: Slay the Spire 2 becomes the biggest roguelike deck-builder on Steam ever
contents:
Mega Crit have a massive success on their hands with the Early Access release of Slay the Spire 2, smashing records across the Steam store.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/slay-the-spire-2-becomes-the-biggest-roguelike-deck-builder-on-steam-ever/
